parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class UmlReverseApp

class MainController

package javafx {
  class Stage
  class Scene
  class BorderPane
  class MenuBar
  class TabPane
  class MenuItem
}

package diagram {
  package visitor {
    interface IDiagramVisitor {
      + visit(ClassDiagram visitor) : void
      + visit(SequenceDiagram visitor) : void
      + visit(UseCaseDiagram visitor) : void
      + visit(DiagramManager visitor) : void
    }
    class ToViewVisitor {
      + getDiagramMenu() : IDiagramMenu
      + getDiagramEditor() : IDiagramEditor
    }
  }
}

class TreeFileManagerView
interface IDiagramMenu
interface IDiagramEditor

UmlReverseApp o--> "1" MainController : controller
UmlReverseApp o--> "1" Stage : stage
UmlReverseApp ..> IDiagramVisitor

MainController ..> Stage

Stage o--> "1" Scene : scene
Scene o--> "1" BorderPane : borderpane

BorderPane o--> "1" MenuBar : north
BorderPane o--> "1" TabPane : center
BorderPane o--> "1" TreeFileManagerView : fileManagerView
BorderPane o--> "1" IDiagramMenu : est

MenuBar o--> "0..n" MenuItem : items

TabPane o--> "0..*" IDiagramEditor : editors

IDiagramVisitor <|.. ToViewVisitor

@enduml
```
